title: Personal Hive
description: Whenever this enemy is hit by an Attack, add [gold]Dazed[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
smart_description: Whenever this enemy is hit by an Attack, add [blue][stack amount][/blue] [gold]Dazed[/gold] into your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold].
notes: Counter stack type power where each stack adds one Dazed card per attack hit. The smart description dynamically shows the current stack amount.
